name: cascade-delay-monotonic
description: Structural invariant: delays are monotonically non-decreasing and delays[0] === 0 on every run. Transcript content doesn't matter for this fixture — any cascade shape must satisfy the property.

input.transcript: OK so let's talk about the latest quarterly earnings report. Tesla announced record production numbers and Elon tweeted about it. Honestly, it's a wild time. Imagine if we had this in 2010. Wow. Anyway, the company raised a Series C at a 12 billion dollar valuation.
